title: oryctanthus occidentalis
intro: Oryctanthus occidentalis, also known as the West African Dogbane, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Oryctanthus occidentalis include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the plant include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as its potential to treat malaria and other diseases. Oryctanthus occidentalis can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
